creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:36:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    hungarian/aspell     Makefile 
    hungarian/jdictionary-eng-hun Makefile 
    hungarian/jdictionary-eng-hun-expr Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.5       +1 -0      ports/hungarian/aspell/Makefile
  1.6       +1 -1      ports/hungarian/jdictionary-eng-hun-expr/Makefile
  1.6       +1 -1      ports/hungarian/jdictionary-eng-hun/Makefile
